headline: 中际旭创：高端光模块产品的订单和出货在持续增加，公司供应链稳定
abstract: 对于公司产能利用率和扩产情况，管理层在投资者问答环节回应称，公司目前产能利用率充足，产能也在持续扩建中。对于公司800G/1.6T光模块当前海外客户出货及订单情况，管理层指出，公司高端光模块产品的订单和出货在持续增加。公司将持续优化产品结构，毛利率有望稳中有升。

headline: If you become exceptional at managing agents, but are also exceptional in your understanding of the fundamentals, you will be unstoppable. We all prefer to work with masters of their craft. What’s new: you can’t afford to miss out on the amplification agents have on your output

This isn't left vs right. Do you believe people are fundamentally capable and just need tools? Or fundamentally helpless and need management? AI is the biggest test of that question we've ever run. I know my answer, and am building open source accordingly.

Every intermediary thinks they're essential (yes even me). VCs, unions, regulators, nonprofits all claim to serve the people they sit between. AI make all of them less necessary for admin and coordination. That's not an attack on workers. AI automates and reduces the role of these intermediaries and the winners are the people being mediated. I think about this every day as we steward YC.

headline: 高盛：AI主线逻辑发生什么根本性变化？
abstract: 高盛指出，AI投资逻辑正从“烧多少钱”转向“何时兑现回报”。谷歌云与AWS合计收入积压已飙升至8320亿美元，凸显AI需求远超算力供给；与此同时，谷歌、META等科技巨头继续上调资本开支预期。市场开始更关注自由现金流、利润率与AI收入转化路径，能清晰证明AI变现能力的公司获得更高估值，而回报逻辑模糊的企业则明显跑输。
